opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like my whole stomach is cramped and burning, I cannot even stand up straight or move.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden severe stomach pain that started a few hours ago and is not settling, and I can't stand up straight or move around.

symptom_narrative.character: started as a dull ache and quickly became sharp and constant, burning and cramping all over my stomach
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — I can't stand up straight or move
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my stomach, not just one spot
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: taking a deep breath or shifting position makes it much worse, so I'm breathing shallow on purpose
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling sick to my stomach, threw up twice, feel like I have a fever
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't stand up straight, can't move, staying completely still in bed

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse is at home and very worried

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants pain relief and to know what is happening

communication_style.typical_message_style: short, pained sentences; may need spouse to relay some details

access_barriers.transport: spouse present and able to assist with ambulance handover
